chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT AT LARKANA Civil Revision No.S-04 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection "A". 2. For orders MA No.26/2018 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-. 24.12.2018 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for Applicants. Mr. Imdad Ali Mashori, Advocate for private respondents. Mr. Abid Hussain Qadri, State Counsel..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The applicants filed a suit for Declaration, Cancellation and Permanent Injunction before learned 2nd Senior civil Judge, Shikarpur, the plaint whereof was rejected by learned 2nd Senior Civil Judge, Shikarpur, at the instance of private respondents vide his order dated 20.04.2017, such rejection of their plaint was impugned by the applicants by way of filing an appeal, it was dismissed by learned 5th Additional District Judge, Shikarpur, such dismissal of their appeal is impugned by the applicants before this Court by way of filing the instant civil revision application. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicants that he would not press the disposal of instant civil revision application on merits, if the applicants subject to law, are permitted to file a fresh suit before the learned trial Court. The suggestion advanced by learned counsel for the applicants is not opposed by learned counsel for the private respondents and learned State Counsel. In view of above, the instant civil revision application is dismissed as not pressed with permission to the applicants to file a fresh suit before learned trial Court, subject to law. No order as to costs. J UDGE.
